message.content: A medium-long-angle shot captures a mountain view in horizontal landscape orientation under a soft, twilight sky with a palette of pink, blue, orange, and purple. Snow-dusted mountains gather to the left, standing jaggedly high over a thick sea of clouds and a dark, high-altitude mountain landscape. The left peaks rise taller and more defined against the light sky. Soft, alpenglow reflections of sunset in orange and pink reach across the snowy faces. In the vertical midsection of the photo, a dense, turbulent sea of mist stretches towards the horizon between two mountain ranges. Far in the distance on the right, the mist recedes to reveal mountain ranges fading in a thin atmospheric haze. The clouds appear as fluffy, pillowy formations that texture the valley and define the separation from the higher, more barren landscape on the right. Dark, undulating rocky ground under a high-altitude natural landscape dominates the foreground on the bottom right and edges up along the left. Sharp, cool colors and natural, diffuse lighting.
